validation.minLength: Must be at least {{min}} characters long
validation.maxLength: Must be at most {{max}} characters long
validation.maxBytes: Must be at most {{max}} bytes long (umlauts and special characters count as several)

registerSuccess.title: Registration successful
registerSuccess.message: Your account has been created successfully. You can now sign in with your credentials.

logoutFailed.title: Logout failed
logoutFailed.message1: The server could not confirm that your session was ended. You are signed out on this device, but your session might still be active.
logoutFailed.message2: You can try again. If the problem persists, delete this site's cookies in your browser to end the session safely.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
